content.observe: Cocoa Touch at the top, then Media, then Core Services, then the Core OS layer closest to the hardware — each layer built on the one beneath it.
content.fault: An app tried to call straight down to the Core OS layer, skipping every layer meant to mediate that access. That's not how this is supposed to work.

hotspots.label: Cocoa Touch (SDK)
hotspots.detail: The application-facing framework layer developers build against.

hotspots.label: Core Services
hotspots.detail: Fundamental system services: networking, location, core data.

hotspots.label: Core OS
hotspots.detail: The lowest layer — kernel, drivers, and direct hardware access.
